Why CryptoCalk?

⚡

Blazing Fast

Static HTML + minimal JS. Pages load in under 1 second, even on 3G.

🔒

Privacy First

All calculations run in your browser. No data leaves your device. No tracking.

🌍

Multilingual

Available in 6 languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, and Russian.

📱

Mobile Ready

Responsive design with touch-optimized controls. Use anywhere, anytime.

What Is CryptoCalk?

CryptoCalk is a free, open-source suite of 108 cryptocurrency calculators available in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, and Russian) — totaling over 1,100 pages of tools and educational content. Every calculation runs entirely in your browser: no data is sent to our servers and no account is required.

Our tools cover the full spectrum of crypto decision-making: profit and loss analysis, mining profitability, ASIC miner profitability, dollar-cost averaging simulation, tax estimation for 17 countries, staking rewards projection, portfolio rebalancing, leverage and liquidation, risk-adjusted performance metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, VaR), and DeFi yield comparison. Each calculator includes detailed methodology, worked examples, and search-targeted FAQ.

Useful conversion tools include the Satoshi-to-USD converter, APR to APY converter, and live crypto-to-fiat converter for quick lookups during research.

Built with documented formulas and real-time market data from CoinGecko, CryptoCalk is designed for traders, investors, and researchers who want reliable numbers without signup walls, premium tiers, or tracking cookies.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is CryptoCalk free to use?

Yes, completely free. All 108 calculators work without signup, payment, or ads. The site is open-source and the codebase is publicly available on GitHub.

Are my calculations private?

Yes. Every calculation runs in your browser using client-side JavaScript. No trade data, portfolio values, or personal information is sent to our servers. We use Google Analytics for anonymous page view statistics only.

How accurate are the calculators?

Our calculators use standard financial formulas documented on the methodology page. Market data like BTC and ETH prices is pulled from CoinGecko in real time; other inputs (difficulty, gas prices) use up-to-date benchmarks you can adjust. Results are estimates — always verify with your exchange's actual figures before making financial decisions.

What cryptocurrencies are supported?

The Profit Calculator and Converter support 500+ cryptocurrencies via CoinGecko's API. Specialized calculators (mining, staking, gas) support specific networks including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and major L2s.

Who built CryptoCalk?

CryptoCalk was created by Konstantin Iakovlev, a developer with 10+ years in finance and technology, active in cryptocurrency since 2017.

Built by Konstantin Iakovlev 10+ years in finance & crypto
